# AuthKit

> An OIDC Authorization Server and client kit for AdonisJS. Drop in a real OpenID Connect
> provider — organizations, JWT access tokens, LGPD/GDPR compliance, MFA, WebAuthn, bot
> protection, impersonation, admin console, audit logging — standalone or embedded.

## Docs

- [Introduction](/docs): Overview of AuthKit, the packages, and key features.
- [Getting Started](/docs/getting-started): Install, configure, and mount the server kit.
- [Starter](/docs/starter): Starter template for a new AdonisJS app with AuthKit.
- [Topologies](/docs/topologies): Standalone vs embedded deployment strategies.
- [Personal Access Tokens](/docs/personal-access-tokens): Long-lived machine-to-machine tokens with scopes.
- [Impersonation](/docs/impersonation): RFC 8693 token-exchange to act as another user.
- [MFA](/docs/mfa): TOTP enrollment, login challenge, recovery codes, and trusted devices.
- [WebAuthn](/docs/webauthn): Passkey registration and login (WebAuthn Level 2).
- [Passwordless](/docs/passwordless): Magic-link email login and passkey-first sign-in.
- [Refresh Tokens](/docs/refresh-tokens): Token rotation and proactive refresh in the middleware.
- [Back-Channel Logout](/docs/back-channel-logout): Out-of-band session termination via logout_token.
- [Account Linking](/docs/account-linking): Link multiple social identity providers to one account.
- [Dynamic Registration](/docs/dynamic-registration): RFC 7591/7592 dynamic client registration.
- [Device Flow](/docs/device-flow): RFC 8628 Device Authorization Grant for input-constrained clients.
- [Account Lockout](/docs/account-lockout): Progressive per-email lockout against brute-force.
- [Organizations](/docs/organizations): Multi-tenancy — orgs, members, invitations, org claims, admin, API, SDK, React.
- [Compliance](/docs/compliance): LGPD/GDPR — account deletion, data export, verified-email gate, verified email-change flow (double-confirmation, cancellation, mail hooks onEmailChangeConfirm/onEmailChangeNotice), security notifications (password_changed/mfa_enabled/mfa_disabled/passkey_added/passkey_removed/email_changed via onSecurityNotice hook, security_notifications setting).
- [Passwords & Migration](/docs/passwords-and-migration): Policy, HIBP breach check, lazy rehash, legacy verifier, pepper (HMAC-SHA256, rotation, lazy re-pepperization), password history (auth_password_history table, password_history setting), password expiration (password_changed_at column, password_expiration setting, forced change-password step), users:import.
- [Runtime Settings](/docs/settings): The canonical guide to the 18 known runtime setting keys — philosophy (DB source of truth, config=infra), single precedence rule (setting>config>default), complete catalog with shapes and defaults, admin console sections, Admin API/SDK/CLI (authkit:settings:list/get/set/unset), fail-safes, migration from deprecated config fields, authkit:doctor checks.
- [Customizing Auth](/docs/customizing-auth): Extend or override the bundled flows.
- [Security](/docs/security): Rate-limiting, bot protection, registration toggle, require-verified-email toggle, maintenance mode, authentication methods (all runtime-toggleable via auth_settings), JWT ATs, key rotation, DPoP, PAR, step-up, audit, mail hooks.
- [React (Frontend)](/docs/react): useAuth, gating components, organization hooks, usePasswordStrength.
- [React Components](/docs/components): Pre-built components — SignInButton, UserButton, OrganizationSwitcher, PasswordStrengthMeter.
- [Host Kit](/docs/host-kit): registerAuthHost (AuthHostOptions: mountPath, social, rateLimit, admin true|{prefix}, adminApi), the render seam, account console routes, branding, ejecting.
- [Client](/docs/client): Wire a relying party; JWT/PAT/opaque resolvers; verifyJwtAccessToken.
- [Account Store](/docs/account-store): AccountStore interface, capabilities, lucidAccountStore.
- [Resolvers](/docs/resolvers): jwt, pat, and opaque resolver factories.
- [Admin Console](/docs/admin-console): Dashboard, users, session context, impersonation, organizations, clients (runtime-managed, static clients deprecated), audit, runtime settings page (6 sections: Security & Access, Email Change, Security Notifications, Passwords, Sessions & Tokens, Admin & Organizations — covering all 18 setting keys). Admin console prefix is configurable via registerAuthHost (default /admin).
- [Admin REST API](/docs/admin-api): Machine-to-machine API — users, orgs, clients (canonical client management path), stats, audit, settings CRUD (runtime toggles), token verify.
- [Backend SDK](/docs/sdk): createAuthkit — remote (HTTP) and embedded (in-process) drivers.
- [Events & Webhooks](/docs/events): Full event type list; in-process callbacks and HMAC-signed webhooks. New events: email_change.requested/cancelled/confirmed, security_notice.sent, session.single_enforced, password.expired_change_forced.
- [Internationalization](/docs/i18n): Built-in pt-BR and English; how to add a locale.
- [Observability](/docs/observability): OpenTelemetry instrumentation, metrics routes, Grafana dashboard.
- [Reference](/docs/reference): Full defineConfig option tables (clients field deprecated; notifications/trustedDevices/lockout policy/rateLimit buckets/admin.impersonation/organizations policy/password.policy+checkPwned deprecated — move to runtime settings), 18 known runtime setting keys with shapes and defaults, registerAuthHost AuthHostOptions (including admin prefix), ace commands (authkit:settings:list/get/set/unset, authkit:clients:import), client/SDK exports.
- [Changelog](/docs/changelog): Version history and migration notes.
